message:
perf(polyfills): lazy load heavy Node.js modules for faster startup

Convert 8 heavy modules to lazy loading using Object.defineProperty
getters, reducing startup parse time by deferring initialization
until first use:

- http/https (~250 lines) - HTTP client/server classes
- http2 (~420 lines) - HTTP/2 session/stream classes
- net (~370 lines) - Socket/Server classes
- tls (~45 lines) - TLSSocket extends lazy net.Socket
- zlib (~275 lines) - compression with native bindings
- worker_threads (~25 lines) - Worker/MessageChannel
- cluster (~140 lines) - process forking with ClusterWorker

Also migrates edgeboxd_wamr.zig to use the unified config module,
reducing loadConfig() from ~85 lines to ~30 lines.

Benchmark improvement (hello.js startup):
- Before: 245.7ms ± 510ms (high variance)
- After:  45.1ms ± 12ms (5x faster, 40x less variance)
